title: Observe permaculture principles and work practices
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Observe permaculture principles and work practices demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to work in a permaculture environment

pcs.text: Meet with supervisor, observe conditions and receive work tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Meet with supervisor, observe conditions and receive work tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Meet with supervisor, observe conditions and receive work tasks.

pcs.text: Identify required materials, tools and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify required materials, tools and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify required materials, tools and equipment.

pcs.text: Check materials, tools and equipment and inform supervisor of deficiencies or faults
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check materials, tools and equipment and inform supervisor of deficiencies or faults?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check materials, tools and equipment and inform supervisor of deficiencies or faults.

pcs.text: Load and unload materials according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Load and unload materials according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Load and unload materials according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and inform and clarify controls with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and inform and clarify controls with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and inform and clarify controls with supervisor.

pcs.text: Select and use personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and use personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to work in a permaculture environment

elements.title: Identify and apply permaculture work practices

pcs.text: Identify environmentally sustainable work practices, and seek clarification from supervisor when unsure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmentally sustainable work practices, and seek clarification from supervisor when unsure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmentally sustainable work practices, and seek clarification from supervisor when unsure.

pcs.text: Adopt work practices that maximise productivity and time efficiency and minimise waste and resource use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adopt work practices that maximise productivity and time efficiency and minimise waste and resource use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adopt work practices that maximise productivity and time efficiency and minimise waste and resource use.

pcs.text: Follow instructions and directions and ask for clarification when unsure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow instructions and directions and ask for clarification when unsure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow instructions and directions and ask for clarification when unsure.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify and apply permaculture work practices

elements.title: Contribute to improved permaculture practices

pcs.text: Improve personal permaculture practices through accessing and applying current information on permaculture
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Improve personal permaculture practices through accessing and applying current information on permaculture?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Improve personal permaculture practices through accessing and applying current information on permaculture.

pcs.text: Apply permaculture practices supporting the environment and community issues following discussions with supervisor and colleagues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply permaculture practices supporting the environment and community issues following discussions with supervisor and colleagues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply permaculture practices supporting the environment and community issues following discussions with supervisor and colleagues.

pcs.text: Contribute to review of practices in a permaculture environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Contribute to review of practices in a permaculture environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Contribute to review of practices in a permaculture environment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Contribute to improved permaculture practices

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
